repro_lock.stochasticity_declaration: LLM outputs are not byte-reproducible. This lockfile documents configuration, not a deterministic replay guarantee.

external_protocols.s2_api_protocol_version: not-invoked; DOI, arXiv, ACL Anthology and USENIX primary metadata used

experiment_provenance.title: SparSamp compatibility and sparse precision replay study
experiment_provenance.description: Consolidated provenance ledger for the official compatibility reproduction and R041-R049 replay experiments. Per-run configurations and model fingerprints remain in the referenced result files.

repro_lock.stochasticity_declaration: LLM outputs are not byte-reproducible. This lockfile documents configuration, not a deterministic replay guarantee.

model.id: gpt2-and-qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct; exact fingerprints in result files

planned_vs_executed.planned: Run the official SparSamp Basic Test without changing encode_spar or decode_spar.
Run the 12-condition official GPT-2 compatibility matrix over 100 IMDB contexts per condition.
Establish an FP32-to-FP16 GPT-2 replay-certificate pilot.
Establish a fixed-length FP16-to-BF16 Qwen pilot.
Evaluate the public sentence-completion stopping rule.
planned_vs_executed.metric: sentence completion and corrected exact replay

planned_vs_executed.planned: Run the main bilingual top-two FP16-to-BF16 scale experiment.
planned_vs_executed.metric: corrected exact replay and mean correction rate

planned_vs_executed.planned: Run the matched top-four contract-width ablation.
planned_vs_executed.metric: retained mass, truncation component and correction rate

planned_vs_executed.planned: Reverse the Qwen precision direction from BF16 references to FP16 replay.
Reconstruct the frozen seed-0 bundle without copying a target correction manifest.
Audit payload-only, self-contained and referenced-package serialization costs.
Replay the frozen package on an independent GPU and CUDA stack.
planned_vs_executed.skip_reason: No second independent hardware environment was available before Stage 2.5. The manuscript excludes cross-hardware claims.

planned_vs_executed.planned: Collect blinded human semantic-quality ratings for R048 materials.
planned_vs_executed.skip_reason: R048 remains ethics-pending and no participants were recruited. The manuscript excludes human-quality claims.

negative_results.description: Uncorrected FP16-to-BF16 replay recovered only 10 of 60 main-scale trajectories.
Increasing support from top-two to top-four did not reduce correction density and reduced structural sentence completion in the controlled ablation.

known_limitations.description: Qwen replay evidence uses one checkpoint and one RTX 3060 Laptop GPU stack.
R047 is a same-machine package-separation smoke test, not independent hardware validation.
Replay operates on token identifiers and does not test public-text re-tokenization.
No human semantic-quality ratings were collected.
Top-k support truncates the source distribution, so zero-KL and distribution-preservation claims are prohibited.

claims.claim_text: The official SparSamp compatibility reproduction passed the declared decoding and capacity gates with stated limitations.
A shared public seed alone did not reliably reproduce the tested Qwen trajectories across FP16 and BF16.
Complete target-specific correction manifests recovered every tested corrected trajectory.
Cross-precision corrections were sparse for the tested Qwen configuration.
A referenced compact certificate was smaller than its matching referenced full trace for the audited seed-0 bundle.
Corrected replay succeeded in both FP16/BF16 directions within the tested stack.
Top-four retained more source mass but did not reduce correction density in the controlled ablation.
The reference-only package reconstructed the frozen seed-0 subset on the source machine without copying a target manifest.

manifest_negative_constraints.rule: Do not claim target-independent or cross-hardware determinism.
Do not claim zero KL, full-distribution preservation, semantic equivalence, security or undetectability.
Do not treat sentence punctuation as a human semantic-quality result.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: The official SparSamp compatibility reproduction passed the declared decoding and capacity gates with stated limitations.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Official SparSamp compatibility reproduction establishes artifact fidelity
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: Direct recount gives 846/846 eligible exact decodes, 16/16 capacity checks within 5%, and seven budget-exhausted trials retained as limitations.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: A shared public seed alone did not reliably reproduce the tested Qwen trajectories across FP16 and BF16.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Exact replay scales across bilingual prompts
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: Direct recount found 10 uncorrected exact trajectories among all 60 configured trials.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: Complete target-specific correction manifests recovered every tested corrected trajectory.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Exact replay scales across bilingual prompts
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: R041, R042, R043, R044, R045 and R046 all report complete corrected recovery; direct R044 recount is 60/60.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: Cross-precision corrections were sparse for the tested Qwen configuration.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Exact replay scales across bilingual prompts
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: The deterministic analysis and direct row mean both give 0.021605904154340095 with cluster interval 0.018013859157276123-0.025277080761966178.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: A referenced compact certificate was smaller than its matching referenced full trace for the audited seed-0 bundle.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Replay-package cost depends on the audit boundary
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: The recomputed referenced ratio is 1148/4636 = 0.24762726488352027; the manuscript names the shared-bundle assumption.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: Corrected replay succeeded in both FP16/BF16 directions within the tested stack.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Replay is stable in both FP16/BF16 directions within the tested environment
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: The matched forward and reverse subsets each achieved 20/20 corrected exact replay, and the claim remains limited to the tested stack.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: Top-four retained more source mass but did not reduce correction density in the controlled ablation.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Results: Contract width exposes a distribution-reliability Pareto frontier
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: The paired retained-mass interval is positive, while the equal-trial correction-rate difference interval includes zero; the null correction result is disclosed.

experiment_alignment_results.claim_text: The reference-only package reconstructed the frozen seed-0 subset on the source machine without copying a target manifest.
experiment_alignment_results.manuscript_locator: Discussion: limitations and same-machine replay boundary
experiment_alignment_results.rationale: The target report gives 20/20 corrected replay and 5/20 uncorrected replay, while the manuscript explicitly labels this as a same-machine smoke test.

human_oversight: [WEAK EVIDENCE] Author names, qualifications and an adjudication record remain AUTHOR_INPUT_NEEDED.
transparency: [WEAK EVIDENCE] Tool names, versions and per-stage parameters are not yet enumerated in the manuscript.
reproducibility: paper/STAGE25_MATERIAL_PASSPORT.json contains a populated repro_lock and stochasticity declaration.
R002 and R041-R049 result files record configurations, hashes or deterministic signatures.
fit_for_purpose: The manuscript states that executable changes were reviewed with tests or source inspection.
[WEAK EVIDENCE] The manuscript does not yet justify each AI tool against a validation reference or pilot.
